recent_thoughts.thought: I'm fascinated by the concept of Neo-progressive rock and how it emerged in the 1980s as a response to the earlier progressive rock movement. I'm intrigued by the idea that this genre was a reaction to the commercialization and stagnation of progressive rock, and that it sought to push the boundaries of what was possible in terms of music composition and performance.
